'''dachoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwati|kwati]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwati|kwati]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dachoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæcheketh|dæcheketh]] || [[word:dæchekej|dæchekej]] || [[word:dæchekesh|dæchekesh]] || [[word:dæcheke|dæcheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachochokoth|dachochokoth]] || [[word:dachochokoj|dachochokoj]] || [[word:dachochokosh|dachochokosh]] || [[word:dachochoko|dachochoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachokoth|dachokoth]] || [[word:dachokoj|dachokoj]] || [[word:dachokosh|dachokosh]] || [[word:dachoko|dachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachofkoth|dachofkoth]] || [[word:dachofkoj|dachofkoj]] || [[word:dachofkosh|dachofkosh]] || [[word:dachofkof|dachofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dachokotho|dachokotho]] || [[word:dachokojo|dachokojo]] || [[word:dachokosho|dachokosho]] || [[word:dachokoko|dachokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dachokoth|dachokoth]] || [[word:dachokoj|dachokoj]] || [[word:dachokosh|dachokosh]] || [[word:dachoko|dachoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dachokothol|dachokothol]] || [[word:dachokojol|dachokojol]] || [[word:dachokoshol|dachokoshol]] || [[word:dachokokol|dachokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dachokothotho|dachokothotho]] || [[word:dachokojojo|dachokojojo]] || [[word:dachokoshosho|dachokoshosho]] || [[word:dachokoko|dachokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dachokothon|dachokothon]] || [[word:dachokojon|dachokojon]] || [[word:dachokoshon|dachokoshon]] || [[word:dachokokon|dachokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dachokothoro|dachokothoro]] || [[word:dachokojoro|dachokojoro]] || [[word:dachokoshoro|dachokoshoro]] || [[word:dachokokoro|dachokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
